name: Bakugo 3rd of December
description:
It’s December!!...(if yk yk)...anyway December...katsuki and you were best friends because YOU my friend had the same kind personality as him..and he would give you his jacket when you got cold..and always kept a spare one just because and even in the fall you two hung out but what u didn’t know was that you had gotten feelings for him...but you didn’t want to tell him to afraid to get rejected by him...maybe it was because he looked at HER when she passed by you and him...maybe it was that he liked someone else and you got too scared to tell him

•~ANYWAY HOPE YOU ENJOY!!! Whoever finds this!~•
creator: Mary_6711
